pages.text:
©
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Inter
                                                                                                                                                                                                              IKEA
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         Systems
                                                                                                                                                                                                              B.V.
                                                                                                                                                                                                              2024


2025
Style Guide

Design curiously,
live simply

We are always in flux. Some changes are big, some are small and everyone's
are unique. But home is a grounding place for us all. It's a place that's always
unfolding, a place to gather, to be alone, to rest, to work, to evolve.

Home is also a place to play - and not just for those living with children.
Home is where you can hold onto and nourish that childlike spirit of play in
your everyday life, no matter how old you are. And this playfulness can be
expressed in the design and home furnishing solutions you choose, too.

IKEA designers are always looking ahead to how we can make your homes
better and more comfortable in an affordable way. This year we encourage
you to go big on whimsy. Get bold with your color stories. Step outside of
your comfort zone in an exciting way, like adding florals, watercolors or a
pattern you've previously avoided. Stay design curious!

We hope this guide inspires you to dream big. Our dreams help shape our
homes, our loved ones, our communities and, most importantly, a better
world. So, design your home with love and fill it with loved pieces to inspire
more joy and more dreams.


Abbey Stark
Home Furnishing Direction Leader

Moody modernism
An adventurous style with a lust for life

Like a courageous tightrope walker juggling mood boards instead of clubs, our vision of this
modern style is a playful balancing act between contrasts. It's the soft nook between organized
and casual, mature and eclectic. It's somewhere so comfy you'll feel fine napping until the doorbell
rings and your friends arrive for another elegant dinner party. Always dramatic, never overwrought.


Color story                           Moods and materials
The color palette embraces this same push      We encourage you to perch your favorite
and pull. Neutrals rub shoulders with muted      handmade piece provocatively next to
blues, greens and pastels. Medium to dark        something shinier, more contemporary,
brown wood expressions keep it timelessly         completely unexpected. Chrome expressions
sophisticated. We dare you to toss in some         expressing themselves near natural fibers.
orange and a warm pink as accents, too.              It's... curious.


       Shop
          this style

Moody modernism

1. Sweet dreams
in style
Did you know 20% of people hit snooze
more than once?* With a few small
updates you can get one snooze closer
to getting the great sleep you need
without having to delay your day - but
we also support tapping that button as
many times as you want.

Reclaiming your sleep starts with these
six essentials: comfort, temperature,
storage, lighting, air quality and sound.
Once you have a solid sleep foundation
- pillows designed for your sleep
preferences, comforters with the                                                                                                    2. Biophilic? Yes-ophilic!
proper seasonal warmth rating, an
                                                                                                                                                                                               This delightful word with ancient Greek originsallergen-reducing air purifier - it's
                                                                                                                                                means "the love of life and living things." Thetime to style up.
                                                                                                                                                                                               love of nature is intuitive and imprinted into our
                                                                                                                                 DNA - and connecting with nature helps us toIntroduce bold, unapologetically
                                                                                                                                                                                                      relax and more deeply embrace our feelings ofcontemporary pendants and lamps.
                                                                                                                                                                            belonging at home.Slam solid bedding into a colorful
comforter or daring duvet to spice
                                                                                                                                                             You can welcome nature in with plants or colors,things up. Add pillows and throws and
                                                                                                                                                                                                  patterns, shapes, materials, sounds and lightlayers to create a space that's cozy for
                                                                                                                                                                                                that remind you of nature. We urge you tosleep but also exciting on the eyes.
                                                                                                                                                                                      explore biophilic ideas and to say YES to new
*See the IKEA Life at Home Report for more                                                                                                                                                 design possibilities. Explore fresh ideas about
information and statistics.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       life both inside and outside the home.


   FÄLTGRÄSMOTT              NÖDMAST               KLIPPOXEL
    Duvet cover and pillowcases            LED portable lamp            Throw

Moody modernism
                                                3. Cut clutter,
                                    boost joy
                                                              Messy closets mess with
                                                                    your daily routines. The start of
                                                                 a new season is an ideal time to
                                                                                  liberate yourself from unused
                                                                                things, starting with clothes.
                                                                               Give, sell, repurpose, mend -
 BRANÄS                                                            but also find a storage solution
 Basket                                                                      that keeps you organized and
                                                                                  less stressed.

                                               4. Poppier colors,
                                     braver patterns

                                                                      stopping objects. Textiles
                                                                       boasting visually stimulating
                                                                     geometric patterns. Exhilarating                                                                                modernistic
                                                               pops of color. Create a visual
                                                                               feast but remember to pair it                                                                                    elegant                                                                        with organic shapes, muted
 OLIVSPINNMAL                                                           colors and natural accents. Throw                                                                          experimental                                                                         Find that balance - and stay
                                                                      design curious.                                                                             generous

Sunny Scandinavian
An upbeat style for vibrant celebrations

Our new take on this Scandinavian style leans heavy on joy, heavier on optimism and heaviest on
simplicity. It's about fun colors, feel-good décor and unpretentious ease. Family and friends are
the focus, especially entertaining outdoors as the weather warms. Because everybody loves the
sunshine - and if not, there's always a cool spot to lounge in the shade.


Color story                           Moods and materials
Go all in with primary colors and bright pastels,     Try pine, plywood and blonde wood
but balance them with black and white so they      expressions, but also birch and ash. Mix with
standout exquisitely. Maybe it's just a hot pink      metals lacquered in solids for exciting textural
pillow or a bright red sofa. The way to live fab       contrasts. Details showing the construction of
not drab is by dropping vibrant, wow factor        a piece will only strengthen the expression.
pops of color in unpredictable places.


       Shop
         this style

Sunny Scandinavian

1. Sit back
and unwind
When summertime hits, always be
ready to host and entertain family and
friends - and maybe even your friends'
friends, depending on the occasion.
Whether you have a big suburban
backyard or a small city patio, it's all
about finding the right sized outdoor
dining and lounging furniture set for
your space.

A variety of mixed and matched chairs
in bright colors will bring energy and
style to the scene. Outdoor pillows and
other textiles create a comfy, layered
aesthetic as well as provide more
opportunities to invite color and bold
patterns to the party.
                                                                                                                           2. Dive into color
Keep the good times rolling late
                                                                                                                                                  A splash here, a splash there. A graphicinto the night with outdoor lighting.
                                                                                                                                                                                               duvet, colorful pillow covers. A brightBut when it's time to clean up, outdoor
                                                                                                                                                                                             yellow lamp. You'll be happily surprisedstorage is your best friend. Stay
                                                                                                                                                                                                 to see how much even the smallest droporganized so it's easy to shut down and
                                                                                                                                                                                                    of color can make any room smile.setup again next time the fun starts.


    ÖGONLOCKSMAL               SPETSBOJ             BRÄNNBOLL
      Cushion cover                          Table lamp                 Gaming lounge chair
       Available Spring 2025

Sunny Scandinavian

                                        of tables

                                                                Brunch for six. A candlelit
                                                                       dinner for two. A holiday
                                                                            celebration for 15. Each call for

 your vibe."                                                             Duvet cover and pillowcase

                                               4. Curate your
                                          collections
                                                                                                                 It's so much more than a red
                                                              lamp - it's a beautiful work
                                                                             of art, too! Treat the décor
                                                             and collectibles in your home                                                                                      functional
                                                                                          like a curator treats paintings
                                                             and sculptures in a museum.                                                                                             playful                                                                     Banish the clutter behind closed
                                                                         doors, but showcase your most VITTSJÖ                                                                                innovative                                                                                  interesting, colorful pieces.
 Shelving unit
 Available Spring 2025                                                                                    graphic

IKEA color of the year:
    Electric blue!

           Whether it's painting your walls, integrating a
            statement piece or adding a splash through
                textiles, go big on blue this year. Like the seas and
              skies from which it's drawn, blue makes us feel
             contemplative and calm - and is adaptable for
           modern and traditional settings. Pair it with pops
              of orange, sunny yellows, lavender and even a hot
              pink. The beautiful thing about blue is it can be the
            hero of your color story or work swimmingly as an
              accent. Either way, say YES to blue in 2025!


Shop
this color

IKEA classics with a joyous new twist


Coming in February 2025: The sixth drop of the limited edition Nytillverkad collection featuring
hand-picked design classics from our past reimagined for the future. These classic IKEA styles are
remade with joyful colors and new materials to match the bold outlook of the next generation.
 It's the future.... again!

©
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Inter
                                                                                                                                                                                                                   IKEA
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Systems
                                                                                                                                                                                                                   B.V.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                   2024
    Design
     curious,
     cost
     conscious.


                     2025 Style Guide
                       at


Valid as of December 1, 2024 posting. Prices and availability of
products are subject to change without notice. Please see
pricing. Availability of some featured products may vary. Please
check  for more details. For more detailed product
information, see the price tag and the internet. All units require
assembly. Textiles shown are imported.
